title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a complete AI video generation workflow powered by Claude Code that automates planning, video synthesis, voiceover, music, and editing. The system integrates HyperFrames for video generation and Archon as the orchestration harness to run the entire pipeline end-to-end without manual production steps.
